title: 【转载】滨海边疆区一男子涉嫌向中共出卖情报被指控「叛国罪」
meta_description: 【转载】滨海边疆区一男子涉嫌向中共出卖情报被指控「叛国罪」 - 新闻转载自russianfreepress  A resident of the Primorsky Territory was charged with treason in favor of China (Article 275 of the Crim...
meta_keywords: 转载,滨海,边疆区,男子,涉嫌,中共,出卖,情报,指控,叛国罪
contents:
新闻转载自russianfreepress

A resident of the Primorsky Territory was charged with treason in favor of China (Article 275 of the Criminal Code of the Russian Federation). Astra writes about it. According to the Telegram channel, the man's name is Lukin I.A., the case against him was opened on March 15, 2023.

The investigation claims that in 2013 Lukin traveled to China, where he “established confidential cooperation with a career officer of the PRC intelligence service, Yang Shiheng.” A few years later, in January 2020, a man, allegedly on the instructions of the Chinese special services of China, took his acquaintance S. B. Yatsenko from Russia to China. It is alleged that he had some knowledge about the military infrastructure of Russia. A criminal case was also initiated against Yatsenko. According to investigators, in 2022, from January 28 to June 20, Yatsenko was on assignment from foreign intelligence agencies, collecting information about Russia's nuclear weapons, "constituting a state secret."

3.15，在习总书记为俄罗斯发展指明方向的一周前，滨海边疆区一名叫Lukin的男子涉嫌向中共出卖情报被指控「叛国罪」受审。Lukin涉嫌自2020年起介绍另一名叫做Yatsenko的男子向中共出卖涉及核武器的情报，该两名男子均被指控「叛国罪」。

值得一提的是，去年7月新西伯利亚大学教授Dmitry Kolker因涉嫌向中共出卖情报被指控「叛国罪」，并于狱中死亡。
